roleDescription: Built a sports academy platform end to end: public marketing site plus private athlete/admin portal (SvelteKit, PostgreSQL).
Shipped a Stripe registration and payment system with validation, duplicate prevention, and dynamic pricing logic.
Integrated Zoho Bigin CRM via REST to sync enquiries and purchases, with node-cron jobs automating athlete lifecycle tracking.
Built an athlete management system with auth, admin overrides, bulk imports, and deduplication (PocketBase, Better Auth, Drizzle ORM).
Wired a Playwright/Vitest E2E and unit suite into a containerized CI/CD pipeline (Docker, Terraform).

Full Stack: Built a tournament management app with a real-time filtering leaderboard, inline admin editing with role-based APIs, and deeplinked shareable scorecards. Delivered 50+ PRs (Next.js 14, TypeScript, SWR, MUI v5).
Full Stack: Built role-based manager and planner UIs for a field ops platform covering billing, work orders, and routing, with unit tests (React, TanStack Router/Query, Tailwind).
Full Stack: Built a Sanity CMS marketing site with parallax, video background, and scroll transitions, deployed via AWS Amplify (Next.js 14, Framer Motion, Styled Components).

Mobile: Built a React Native field service app in under 2 months: OTP auth flow, Google/Facebook OAuth, photo upload with retry/caching, and a status-driven interactive map (Expo, Zustand, TanStack Query).
Mobile: Architected a reusable Flutter Clean Architecture template with AWS Amplify/Cognito auth and a cross-platform Dio HTTP client for rapid team onboarding.
General: Mentored interns on production-grade and AI-assisted development workflows through code reviews and guidance.
Shipped a Flutter VPN app to the Google Play Store in under 3 months, with a companion AstroJS marketing site.
Built a community platform (React, Firebase) handling auth, real-time data, and user management.
Maintained a React Native consultancy app.
Led a Laravel/PHP networking platform for medical professionals.
As creatives head, I specialized in creating esports-related publication materials for the HCDC Esports Club.
featuredEvents: HCDC Esports Club Pokemon Unite Tournament 2021

roleDescription: During my tenure as an officer at HCDC – College of Engineering and Technology Students Organization (HCDC – CETSO), I volunteered to use my graphic design skills to create compelling publication materials for social media platforms.

By actively contributing my skills and expertise in graphic design, I significantly contributed to the success of these events by creating engaging publication materials for social media. This helped promote the events effectively and enhance the online presence of the organization.
